row-sp-pre-occ-same.label: Has the occupancy classification and hazard or contents remained the same since last inspection?

row-sp-pre-in-svc.label: All fire protection systems in service?

row-sp-pre-no-mod.label: Has the system remained in service without modification since the last inspection?

row-sp-pre-no-alarm.label: Was the system free of actuation of devices or alarms since the last inspection?

row-sp-fdc-caps.label: FDC plugs/caps in place and undamaged?

row-sp-fdc-gaskets.label: FDC gaskets in place and undamaged?

row-sp-fdc-drain.label: Automatic drain valve in place and operating?

row-sp-bfv-sealed.label: Backflow valves sealed, locked or supervised and accessible?

row-sp-prv-open.label: PRV valves open position / not leaking?

row-sp-prv-handles.label: PRV valve handles in good condition?

row-sp-nameplate.label: Hydraulic nameplate securely attached to riser and legible?

row-sp-head-count-ok.label: Proper number of sprinklers in head box?

row-sp-heads-obstruction.label: Free of obstruction to spray pattern?

row-sp-heads-paint.label: Free of foreign materials including paint?

row-sp-heads-date.label: Sprinklers in service dated 1920 or later?

row-sp-heads-fast.label: Fast response sprinklers 20+ years old — replaced or sample tested within last 15 years?

row-sp-heads-standard.label: Standard response sprinklers 50+ years old — replaced or sample tested within last 15 years?

row-sp-escutcheons.label: All escutcheons in place / not damaged?

row-sp-heads-20yr.label: Sprinklers are not 20 years or older and are requiring lab testing?

row-sp-pipe-damage.label: Free of mechanical damage / not leaking?

row-sp-pipe-heat.label: Adequate heat in areas with wet piping?

row-sp-pipe-label.label: Pipe appropriately labeled including water flow direction?
